# nameComponents

**Instance Property**

Access the name of the person.

## Declaration

```swift
var nameComponents: PersonNameComponents?
```

## Discussion

You can use this property to construct the person’s name for display. Use the components with an instance of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/PersonNameComponentsFormatter] to create a string representation for the current locale.

## Identifying the person

- **appleID**: Access the Apple ID of the person.
